claimGuardrails: GitHub releases, workflows, manifests, checksums, and DOI records are canonical.
Hugging Face is a generated diligence mirror, not the source of release truth.
Counsel, Terra, and Carlota Jo are intentionally excluded from active-demo scope until funded.
Do not repeat broad all-green or zero-sorry proof claims without a current machine-readable proof report.
Use Defense Unicorns UDS/Zarf-compatible phrasing; do not imply Defense Unicorns endorsement or catalog acceptance.

repos.name: a11oy
repos.showcaseLabel: Operational hub and UDS/Zarf-compatible payload publisher
repos.role: Vertical alignment substrate and operational hub for doctrine packages, UDS payloads, and Hugging Face publish payloads.

repos.role: Composing monorepo for deployed A11oy UI/runtime, Ouroboros runtime, API services, and product integration.
guardrails: Use as canonical integration evidence; keep production-readiness claims scoped to current CI and release artifacts.

repos.role: Bounded recursion runtime, governance loops, and receipt emission spine.

guardrails: Latest observed Lean kernel CI needs upstream repair before broad 'all green' or 'zero sorry' copy is repeated.
Use exact theorem/module references for formal claims.

guardrails: Thesis v18.0 DOI is the current citation anchor; GitHub release list reconciliation remains an upstream action.
Treat the thesis as the claim taxonomy, not blanket runtime proof.
